response.original_title: Plato and Nietzsche: Uncontemporaries in Conversation
response.overview: This philosophical drama imagines a timeless encounter between Plato and Friedrich Nietzsche. In an abstract setting beyond history, the two thinkers debate truth, morality, art, and the meaning of existence. Plato defends eternal ideals and rational order, while Nietzsche challenges him with his critique of metaphysics and his call to revalue all values. Through intense dialogue and symbolic imagery, the film brings their opposing visions into dramatic conflict, inviting viewers to question whether life should be guided by timeless truths or shaped by human creativity and will.
response.title: Plato and Nietzsche: Uncontemporaries in Conversation
